dt-example.title: Configuration options
dt-example.info:
Once you've initialised a DataTable, you'll most likely want to customise it to suit your needs. This can be done with one of [the many options](https://datatables.net/reference/option/) that DataTables and its extensions provide.
When using jQuery, initialisation options are passed through to DataTables as an object given to the `.DataTable()` method on the jQuery chain. In this example `-init scrollY` and `-init paging` are used to create a vertically scrolling table.
